zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwladys ferch Dafydd於大約1310年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Dafydd ap Hywel32歲，母親Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel28歲。她於大約1329年與Ieuan ap Rhys在威爾士布雷康史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1384年之後在威爾士。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwladys ferch Dafydd于大约1310年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲Dafydd ap Hywel32岁，母亲Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel28岁。她于大约1329年与Ieuan ap Rhys在威尔士布雷康史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1384年之后在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: Gwladys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwladys ferch Dafydd was born about 1310, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Dafydd ap Hywel, was 32 and her mother, Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel, was 28. She married Ieuan ap Rhys about 1329, in Breconshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died after 1384, in Wales.

fr.of Ynys Cynlas,Glasbury,Radnorshire,Wale: Glasbury, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwladys ferch Dafydd est née environ 1310, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Dafydd ap Hywel, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Ieuan ap Rhys environ 1329, à Breconshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1384, à Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwladys ferch Dafydd um 1310 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dafydd ap Hywel 32 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel 28. Sie hat um 1329 in Breconshire, Wales Ieuan ap Rhys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1384 in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Dafydd è nata il circa 1310 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Dafydd ap Hywel, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Ieuan ap Rhys circa 1329, nel Breconshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1384, nel Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Dafyddが約1310年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Dafydd ap Hywelは32歳，母Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywelは28歳であった。約1329年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアでIeuan ap Rhysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1384年以後にウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Dafydd(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dafydd ap Hywel(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1329년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 Ieuan ap Rhys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1384년 이후 웨일스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Dafydd nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Dafydd ap Hywel, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Ieuan ap Rhys aproximadamente 1329, em Breconshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1384, em Gales.

ro.of Ynys Cynlas,Glasbury,Radnorshire,Wale: Glasbury, Breconshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwladys ferch Dafydd родилась около 1310 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Dafydd ap Hywel было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ieuan ap Rhys около 1329 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1384 г. в местности Уэльс.

sm.ABT 1310–after 1384: e tusa o le 1310–ina ua ma'ea le 1384

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwladys ferch Dafydd nació aproximadamente 1310, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Dafydd ap Hywel, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs. Dafydd ap Hywel, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ieuan ap Rhys aproximadamente 1329, en Breconshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1384, en Gales.
